**Destination airport (IATA)**

**Gateway airport (IATA)** — the cheaper hub to fly into instead

**Ground leg**
- Mode (train / bus / ferry / drive):
- Approximate one-way cost per person (or per vehicle for drive), in USD:
- Approximate one-way duration (hours):
- Source for the cost/duration (booking site, personal experience, official schedule, etc.):

**Why this is actually worth it**
A sentence or two on why this specific hub is meaningfully cheaper to fly into than the
destination directly — more competition, an LCC base, etc. Real-world knowledge like this is
exactly what a curated PR is better at than an algorithm.

**Anything else worth knowing**
Visa/border crossing involved, seasonal service only, luggage restrictions on the ground leg,
etc.
